activities.name: Special Delivery
activities.summary: In pairs — one throws a ball up, partner moves a hoop to catch it through.

activities.name: Gate Game
activities.summary: Dribble through as many coloured cone gates as you can in 90 seconds.

activities.name: Monster Ball
activities.summary: Two teams throw tennis balls at a mega ball, aiming to drive it over the opponent's end line.

activities.name: Top of the Tree
activities.summary: Pairs throw against a wall, then race to touch the top of a cone with their ball first.

activities.name: Bounce Ball
activities.summary: Pairs bounce the ball into a hoop on the floor for their partner to catch.

activities.name: Perfect Pass
activities.summary: Teams run into hoops while a teammate throws — catch on the full or bounce to claim the hoop.

activities.name: Gift Grabber
activities.summary: Roll a hoop so it lands around scattered equipment to win it for your team.

activities.name: Santa vs Elves
activities.summary: On the coach's call, run to your side before your partner can tag you.

activities.name: Kingpin
activities.summary: 3 attackers create passing triangles to knock down a central cone; 1 defender protects it.

activities.name: Hoop Ball
activities.summary: Team game — pass to a teammate standing inside your hoop to score. No moving with the ball.
